Cocktails | Cucumber Negroni.description: Flecha Azul anejo tequila, Italicus liqueur, Carpano Antica Vermouth.

Cocktails | Mezpresso Martini.description: Ilegal Reposado Caribbean Cask, Fever Tree Espresso, dash of house-made chocolate mole bitters, garnished with Mexican Chocolate spice salt

Cocktails | The Aretha.description: Age tobacco infused Row 94 bourbon, Ilegal reposado Caribbean cask mezcal, Flecha Azul anejo tequila, Ancho Reyes Barrica liquor, house-made coffee and mole reduction.

Desserts | Chocoflan - AKA Pastel Imposi.description: Chocolate cake with a rich creamy flan on top, cajeta caramel (contains gluten, dairy, egg).

Desserts | Chocolate Sugar Skull.description: Chocolate shell filled with white chocolate and Florida Key lime mousse, raspberry compote, vanilla sponge cake soaked with Florida Key lime syrup and graham cracker crumbles.

Desserts | Cuatro Leches.description: Tender cake infused with four milks (coconut, condensed, evaporated, whole) topped with whipped cream, toasted coconut, strawberries & lime zest (contains gluten, dairy, seeds)

Desserts | Flan de Queso.description: Cheesecake flan, guayaba-piloncillo caramel, guava paste, fresh orange (contains dairy)

Desserts | Ice Cream & Sorbet.description: Seasonal selections of ice cream and sorbet.

Entr\u00e9es | Beef Barbacoa Quesadillas.description: Three crispy corn tortilla quesadillas with beef barbacoa, chihuahua cheese, roasted red onions, topped with cilantro and onions, black bean refritos, queso fresco, chipotle salsa, guacamole, lime (contains pork, dairy).

Entr\u00e9es | Butternut Squash & Mushro.description: Just made corn tortillas, oyster mushrooms-butternut squash-grilled red onion & dried cranberry Filling, melty Queso Chihuahua, white onion, toasted pepitas, flat leaf parsley (contains dairy).

Entr\u00e9es | Camarones al Coco.description: Grilled Florida Pink Shrimp, creamy coconut sauce studded with roasted white onion, jalapeño & sundried tomatoes, yuca al mojo (slow cooked garlic, olive oil, lime) and green chile adobo (cilantro, parsley, green chile, garlic, olive oil) - (contains shellfish)

Entr\u00e9es | Carne Asada*.description: Garlic and red chile-marinated Creekstone Natural Black Angus steak, black bean refritos with queso fresco, caramelized plantains with crema and Cotija cheese, tomatillo salsa, warm corn tortillas (contains dairy, pork) | Add mojo garlic grilled shrimp to your steak +14

Entr\u00e9es | Creamy Chicken Enchiladas.description: Just-made corn tortillas, chicken and poblano rajas filling, tomatillo-cream sauce, Queso Chihuahua, sliced red onion, cilantro leaves (contains dairy)

Entr\u00e9es | Grilled Red Snapper.description: Red Snapper brushed with a passion fruit-agave glaze, tropical fruit pico de gallo (passion fruit, red onion, tomato, cilantro, lime, serrano chili). Served with plantain rice and fresh made tortillas.

Entr\u00e9es | Irodori American Wagyu.description: Grilled 6oz Creekstone strip steak, Local Florida corn esquites (queso fresco, mayonnaise, morita-tajin chili, lime), charred knob onions, spicy guajillio chili salsa served with fresh made tortillas.

Entr\u00e9es | Spicy Mango-Habanero Chic.description: Crispy half chicken, mango-habanero sauce, plantain rice, pickled habanero and white onions, cilantro (contains dairy)

Kids Meals | Kids Tacos.description: (2) flour tortillas with chicken, Chihuahua cheese, served with plantain rice, black bean refritos and queso fresco. Substitute Barbacoa +$4.

Kids Meals | Quesadillas.description: warm flour tortillas, Chihuahua cheese served with plantain rice, black bean refritos and queso fresco. Add $3 for Chicken / Add $7 for Barbacoa

Kids Meals | Shredded Chicken.description: Served with plantain rice and black bean refritos (contains pork)

Margaritas | Como La Flor.description: Dulce Vida blanco tequila, hibiscus flower tea, cucumber juice, Cappelletti, Lejay cassis, lime juice, pink pepper corns, hibiscus salt rim (contains tree nuts)

Margaritas | El Dios Chinola.description: Las Californias gin, Chinola passion fruit liqueur and fresh lime juice with Tajin chile powder rim

Margaritas | Frida.description: El Tequileno platinum tequila, rose petal liqueur, lemon juice, pomegranate, served with a rose petal salt rim

Margaritas | Frontera.description: Dulca Vida blanco tequila, Ancho Reyes liqueur, fresh lime juice, orange liqueur, agave nectar. / Topped with El Bajio Sparkling wine +$3

Margaritas | La Cava Avocado.description: Flecha Azul blanco tequila, melon-orange liqueur, fresh avocado and lime juice, hibiscus salt rim. Served Frozen. | with Dos Hombres mezcal +$2

Margaritas | La Paloma.description: Fever-Tree pink grapefruit sparkling soda, fresh lime, Tajín chile-lime powder rim. Choice of Ilegal espadín reposado mezcal or Lalo blanco tequila

Margaritas | Malumita.description: Contraluz reposado cristalino mezcal, peach-pineapple juice, Ancho Reyes liqueur, ginger, Italicus, tortilla ash rim

Margaritas | Play With Fire.description: Fresh lime juice, Spiced nectar, cucumber-jalapeño juice, hibiscus salt rim. Your Choice of Dos Hombres mezcal or Lalo blanco tequila.

Margaritas | Three Amigos.description: Choose 3 of the following: Como La Flor, Viva La Vida, El Dios Chinola, Frontera or Play with Fire.

Margaritas | Topolo.description: Pasote reposado tequila, Alma Finca orange liqueur, housemade limonada

Margaritas | Viva La Vida.description: Dos Hombres mezcal, watermelon juice, agave, Ancho Reyes verde liqueur, tajin chile powder rim.

Starters | Chipotle Chicken Flautas.description: Crispy chipotle chicken tortilla flautas, Chihuahua cheese, red garlicky beans, roasted tomatillo-avocado salsa, garnished with crema, Cotija cheese, fresh herbs (contains dairy)
